title: TransferExpression
description: Specifies a transfer expression (cash price, performance amount, scheduled payment amount, etc.) to define the nature of the transfer amount and its source.

scheduledTransfer.description: Specifies a transfer created from a scheduled or contingent event on a contract, e.g. Exercise, Performance, Credit Event

unscheduledTransfer.description: Specifies an ad-hoc transfer instigated by a party to the contract e.g. Recall, Return.
